title: Crunchy Spicy Greek Sardine Skewers
description: Fresh sardines grilled to a crispy finish and tossed in a zesty Greek yogurt sauce, this spicy Greek dish delivers bold flavors with a satisfying crunch.
instructions: Preheat grill or grill pan to medium‑high heat (200 °C).
In a bowl whisk together olive oil, lemon zest, lemon juice, smoked paprika, cumin, cayenne pepper, oregano, and salt to create a brine.
Brush both sides of each sardine with the brine and let marinate for 10 minutes at room temperature.
Thread each sardine onto a soaked wooden skewer, making sure the whole fish is secured.
Place the skewers on the grill and cook 3–4 minutes per side, until the flesh turns opaque and the skin crisps lightly, reaching an internal temperature of 165 °F (74 °C).
While grilling, whisk Greek yogurt with a pinch of lemon zest and a dash of salt to form a creamy sauce.
When the skewers are done, remove them from the grill, drizzle with the yogurt sauce, and garnish with extra oregano if desired.
Serve immediately with crusty bread or warm pita for a complete Mediterranean meal.
